description: Decomposition: one container split into two. Hungarian + multi-feature similarity should detect the closer of the two (orderApi) as the rename target with lowered confidence — both candidates share label/description/tech/db-relation similarity, the matcher picks the globally optimal pairing. The second container surfaces as `added`. Confidence on the rename stays in the LOW band (< 0.75) so PR review agents understand it's a probable split, not a clean rename.
